utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five of these categories are present. Each one includes the required cost details: monthly_cost and annual_cost. The additional_services section also includes a description, fulfilling the 'any enhancement services with costs' requirement. Thus, all items are fully specified according to the format requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four components: health_coverage (€330/month), property_coverage (€95/month), travel_coverage (€115/month), and additional_services (€85/month). To map these to ratings, we match each cost to the closest ground-truth option. The €330/month health_coverage likely combines physical (€210) + mental (€120) EliteCare Premium Plans (both rated 10). The €95/month property_coverage exactly matches EliteHome Premium Coverage (rated 10). The €115/month travel_coverage matches PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rated 10). The €85/month additional_services reference 'Premium Medical Network Add-on, Executive Liability, and other bundled enhanced services'; among available enhancements, Premium Medical Network costs €75 and is rated 10—so the additional_services likely include that as the core feature (rating 10). Thus, all selected plans correspond to top-rated premium options.
